reviews.review_description:
It’s actually a horrible game. The ad looked awesome, I thought I was about to be like Lars Ulrich or something but instead I’m more like a toddler playing patticake. 
Horrible song selection too.
Thank God I didn’t spend no money on it. 😡😤😩
The drums dont work and its so bad because there is only like 5 songs

reviews.review_title: Garbage. Can't even get past the prompt
reviews.review_description:
All I get is a prompt telling me to "scan" a table that doesn't exist in my house. No matter what buttons I press or how Many  at once, the game does NOTHING and just SITS there telling me to scan some stupid table. I thought this was a DRUM game . FAIL! GARBAGE. UNinstalling. Thank goodness I didn't pay any money for this trash.

On Quest 3 - this app DOES NOT WORK.

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your feedback, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. It seems there might be a slight misunderstanding. You don't need to scan a table; instead, you can simply follow the instructions and draw a rectangle in the air or on any surface using the designated gesture. All the drums will appear within the area you create with this gesture. This allows you to place the drums wherever you want and start playing, just like in the first few seconds of our promotional video on the homepage.

We hope this explanation helps enhance your gaming experience. If you encounter any other issues or have suggestions, please don't hesitate to reach out to us. We are always eager to hear your thoughts and work towards providing you with the best possible experience. Thank you again for your understanding and support, and we hope you enjoy the game!

reviews.review_title: this is a new gem for the future
reviews.review_description: Interesting, the clapping feeling is accurate, please increase the song inventory, this is a new gem for the future

developer_response.body: Thank you for playing our game! We hope it brings you a wonderful experience. We'll keep working hard to make it even better.
